name: Keating Traditional Wingback Recliner: Pushback, Tufted, Plywood Frame - Christopher Knight Home
description: Grandpa's boring old living room recliner is about to get a run for its money - this traditionally-inspired pushback affords you all of the comfort of an ordinary recliner while delivering big-time on style. Its tufted and pleated upholstery, playfully strutted legs, and wingback design will make you feel like you just stepped into a mid-century Hollywood film.
